/usr/bin/g++-13 -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g CMakeFiles/Visual.dir/Visual_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Visual.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Visual.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o -o Visual  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
